member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.ControllerCodeGenerator
member.summary: Generates ASP.NET Core controllers from YAML definitions. Controllers inherit from GenericEntityController for full CRUD.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.ControllerCodeGenerator.GenerateMinimalController(Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition)
member.summary: Generate a minimal controller that inherits all CRUD from GenericEntityController.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.ControllerCodeGenerator.GenerateExtendedController(Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition)
member.summary: Generate a controller with additional custom endpoints based on field types.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.ControllerCodeGenerator.GenerateAllControllers(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate all controllers from a list of definitions.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.EntityCodeGenerator
member.summary: Generates C# entity classes from YAML definitions. Produces strongly-typed entities that inherit from EntityBase.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.EntityCodeGenerator.GenerateEntityClass(Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition)
member.summary: Generate a complete C# entity class file.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.EntityCodeGenerator.GenerateAllEntityClasses(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition})
member.summary: Generate all entity classes from a list of definitions.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.HazinaCodeGen
member.summary:
CLI tool for generating C# code from YAML entity definitions.
Usage: hazina-codegen generate-project --yaml entities.yaml --output ./MyApi --name MyApi hazina-codegen generate-entity --yaml entities.yaml --output ./Entities hazina-codegen generate-controller --yaml entities.yaml --output ./Controllers

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.HazinaCodeGen.GenerateProjectAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a complete project from YAML definitions.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.HazinaCodeGen.GenerateEntitiesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate only entity classes from YAML definitions.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.HazinaCodeGen.GenerateControllersAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate only controller classes from YAML definitions.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.HazinaCodeGen.PreviewAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Print the generated code to console (for preview).

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.ProjectGenerator
member.summary: Generates a complete ASP.NET Core project from YAML entity definitions. Creates a ready-to-run API project with entities, controllers, and configuration.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.CodeGen.ProjectGenerator.GenerateProject(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate all project files.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationLoader
member.summary: Loads entity definitions from YAML or JSON configuration files. This allows defining entities without writing C# code.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationLoader.LoadFromFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads entity definitions from a configuration file. Supports .yaml, .yml, and .json files.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationLoader.LoadFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Loads entity definitions from a directory. Each file can contain one or more entity definitions.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationLoader.LoadFromYaml(System.String)
member.summary: Loads entity definitions from YAML content

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationLoader.LoadFromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Loads entity definitions from JSON content

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationLoader.ValidateDefinitions(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition})
member.summary: Validates entity definitions for correctness

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationRoot
member.summary: Root object for entity configuration files

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityConfigurationRoot.Entities
member.summary: List of entity definitions

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition
member.summary: Defines an entity via configuration (YAML/JSON). This allows non-developers to define new entities without writing C# code.

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.Name
member.summary: The name of the entity (used in routes and table names) Example: "Product", "BlogPost", "Customer"

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.PluralName
member.summary: Optional plural name for list routes. If not set, adds 's' to Name. Example: "Products", "BlogPosts", "Customers"

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.Description
member.summary: Description shown in API documentation

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.Fields
member.summary: The fields/properties of this entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.Features
member.summary: Which features are enabled for this entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.Access
member.summary: Access control settings

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityDefinition.GetPluralName
member.summary: Gets the plural name, generating one if not explicitly set

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition
member.summary: Defines a field/property on an entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.Name
member.summary: Field name (will be used as property name)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.Type
member.summary: Data type of the field

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.Required
member.summary: Whether this field is required

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.MaxLength
member.summary: Maximum length for string fields

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.MinValue
member.summary: Minimum value for numeric fields

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.MaxValue
member.summary: Maximum value for numeric fields

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.DefaultValue
member.summary: Default value (as string, will be parsed)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.Description
member.summary: Description for API documentation

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.Searchable
member.summary: Whether this field should be included in search/embedding

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.Indexed
member.summary: Whether this field should be indexed in the database

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldDefinition.ReferencesEntity
member.summary: For reference fields: the name of the related entity

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.FieldType
member.summary: Supported field types

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures
member.summary: Feature flags for an entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Crud
member.summary: Enable CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Search
member.summary: Enable full-text search

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Embedding
member.summary: Enable RAG embedding generation

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.SoftDelete
member.summary: Enable soft delete instead of hard delete

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Timestamps
member.summary: Track creation and modification timestamps

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Pagination
member.summary: Enable list with pagination

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Filtering
member.summary: Enable filtering via query parameters

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Sorting
member.summary: Enable sorting via query parameters

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.BulkOperations
member.summary: Enable bulk operations (create/update/delete many)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Export
member.summary: Enable export to CSV/Excel

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.EntityFeatures.Realtime
member.summary: Enable real-time updates via SignalR

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl
member.summary: Access control settings for an entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.RequiresAuth
member.summary: Whether authentication is required to access this entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.ReadRoles
member.summary: Roles that can read this entity (empty = all authenticated users)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.CreateRoles
member.summary: Roles that can create this entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.UpdateRoles
member.summary: Roles that can update this entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.DeleteRoles
member.summary: Roles that can delete this entity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.OwnerOnly
member.summary: Whether users can only access their own entities

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Configuration.AccessControl.TenantScoped
member.summary: Whether access is scoped to tenant

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2
member.summary:
Generic CRUD controller that provides standard REST endpoints for any entity type. Inherit from this to get automatic CRUD operations, or use convention-based routing.
Example usage:
public class ProductsController : GenericEntityController<Product, Guid> { public ProductsController(IRepository<Product> repository) : base(repository) { } }
This gives you: - GET /api/products - List all (with pagination, filtering, sorting) - GET /api/products/{id} - Get by ID - POST /api/products - Create - PUT /api/products/{id} - Update - DELETE /api/products/{id} - Delete (soft or hard) - POST /api/products/bulk - Bulk create - GET /api/products/search?q=term - Full-text search

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: GET /api/{entities} List entities with optional pagination, filtering, and sorting

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.GetById(`1)
member.summary: GET /api/{entities}/{id} Get a single entity by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.Create(`0)
member.summary: POST /api/{entities} Create a new entity

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.Update(`1,`0)
member.summary: PUT /api/{entities}/{id} Update an existing entity

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.PartialUpdate(`1,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: PATCH /api/{entities}/{id} Partial update of an entity

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.Delete(`1,System.Boolean)
member.summary: DELETE /api/{entities}/{id} Delete an entity (soft or hard delete based on entity type)

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.BulkCreate(System.Collections.Generic.List{`0})
member.summary: POST /api/{entities}/bulk Create multiple entities at once

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.BulkDelete(System.Collections.Generic.List{`1},System.Boolean)
member.summary: DELETE /api/{entities}/bulk Delete multiple entities at once

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.Count(System.String)
member.summary: GET /api/{entities}/count Get total count of entities

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.Exists(`1)
member.summary: GET /api/{entities}/exists/{id} Check if an entity exists

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.BuildFilterExpression(System.String)
member.summary: Override to customize filter expression building

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`2.ApplySorting(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Override to customize sorting

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.GenericEntityController`1
member.summary: Convenience class for entities with Guid primary keys

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Paginated result container

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: The items on this page

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.Page
member.summary: Current page number (1-based)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.PageSize
member.summary: Number of items per page

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of items across all pages

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: Whether there is a previous page

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.PagedResult`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: Whether there is a next page

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkResult
member.summary: Result of a bulk operation

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkResult.SuccessCount
member.summary: Number of successful operations

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkResult.ErrorCount
member.summary: Number of failed operations

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkResult.Errors
member.summary: Details of any errors

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkError
member.summary: Error detail for a single item in a bulk operation

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkError.Index
member.summary: Index of the item that failed

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.BulkError.Message
member.summary: Error message

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.CountResult
member.summary: Result of a count operation

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.CountResult.Count
member.summary: Total count of entities

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.ExistsResult
member.summary: Result of an exists check

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Controllers.ExistsResult.Exists
member.summary: Whether the entity exists

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController
member.summary:
Catch-all controller that handles ALL entity types defined in YAML. No individual controller files needed!
Routes: GET /api/{entity} - List all GET /api/{entity}/{id} - Get by ID POST /api/{entity} - Create PUT /api/{entity}/{id} - Update DELETE /api/{entity}/{id} - Delete GET /api/{entity}/count - Count GET /api/{entity}/search - Search GET /api/{entity}/schema - Get field definitions

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.GetAll(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /api/{entity} List all entities with pagination

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.GetById(System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: GET /api/{entity}/{id} Get entity by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.Create(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: POST /api/{entity} Create a new entity
member.remarks:
**IMPORTANT:** Use `/api/{entity}/schema` to see required fields and data types for each entity.
**Example for Document entity:** ```json { "title": "My Document Title", "content": "Document content goes here...", "category": "Tutorial", "tags": ["getting-started", "api"], "author": "John Doe" } ```
**Example for Task entity:** ```json { "title": "Complete project documentation", "description": "Write comprehensive API docs", "priority": "high", "dueDate": "2026-01-30T12:00:00Z", "completed": false } ```
**Example for Contact entity:** ```json { "firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Smith", "email": "jane.smith@example.com", "phone": "+1234567890", "company": "Acme Corp", "notes": "Met at conference" } ```
**Tips:** - Don't include `id`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, or `isDeleted` - these are auto-generated - Only required fields must be present (check `/api/{entity}/schema`) - JSON fields (like `tags`) accept arrays or objects - DateTime fields should use ISO 8601 format
member.response: Invalid request body or validation error

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.Update(System.String,System.Guid,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: PUT /api/{entity}/{id} Update an entity

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.Delete(System.String,System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: DELETE /api/{entity}/{id} Delete an entity (soft delete by default)

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.Count(System.String)
member.summary: GET /api/{entity}/count Get count of entities

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.Search(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /api/{entity}/search?q=term Search entities

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.GetSchema(System.String)
member.summary: GET /api/{entity}/schema Get the field definitions for this entity type
member.remarks:
Returns complete schema information for the entity including: - Field names and types - Required vs optional fields - Validation rules (max length, min/max values) - Searchable fields - Enabled features (CRUD, search, embedding, etc.)
**Use this endpoint to discover what fields to send when creating/updating entities.**

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.ListEntityTypes
member.summary: GET /api/_entities List all available entity types
member.remarks:
Returns a list of all entity types defined in the YAML configuration.
For each entity type, you can: - View schema: `GET /api/{entity}/schema` - List items: `GET /api/{entity}` - Create: `POST /api/{entity}` - Search: `GET /api/{entity}/search?q=keyword`

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiController.GetApiGuide
member.summary: GET /api/_guide Complete API guide with schemas and examples
member.remarks:
Returns comprehensive documentation for all entities including: - Complete field schemas - Request body examples (JSON) - Available endpoints - Validation rules
**This is your one-stop guide for using the API!**

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring the dynamic API.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiExtensions.AddHazinaDynamicApi(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds dynamic API services. Entities are defined in YAML - no C# code needed!
member.param: Path to SQLite database (created if not exists)

example.code: // In Program.cs - THIS IS ALL YOU NEED: builder.Services.AddHazinaDynamicApi("entities.yaml", "data.db");

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiExtensions.AddHazinaDynamicApiFromDirectory(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds dynamic API services from a directory of YAML files. Each file can contain multiple entity definitions.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiExtensions.AddHazinaDynamicApiFromYaml(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds dynamic API with inline entity definitions (for testing/demos).

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicApiExtensions.UseHazinaDynamicApi(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Maps the dynamic API endpoints.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity
member.summary: A dynamic entity that can hold any fields defined in YAML. No C# class needed - fields are determined at runtime.

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.Id
member.summary: Entity ID (always present)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: When created (always present)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.UpdatedAt
member.summary: When last updated

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.IsDeleted
member.summary: Soft delete flag

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.EntityType
member.summary: The entity type name (e.g., "Document", "Note")

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Get a property value by name

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.Properties
member.summary: Get all properties as a dictionary

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.FromJson(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create from JSON

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.FromDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Create from dictionary

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.ToJson(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Convert to JSON

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity.ToDictionary
member.summary: Convert to dictionary for storage

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore
member.summary: Storage for dynamic entities using SQLite. No EF Core needed - direct SQL for maximum flexibility.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.InitializeAsync
member.summary: Initialize database tables for all entities

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.GetAllAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all entities of a type

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.GetByIdAsync(System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Get entity by ID

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.CreateAsync(System.String,Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity)
member.summary: Create a new entity

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.UpdateAsync(System.String,System.Guid,Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntity)
member.summary: Update an entity

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Delete an entity (soft delete)

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.CountAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Count entities

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.SearchAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search entities by text (simple LIKE search)

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.GetEntityTypes
member.summary: Get all registered entity types

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Dynamic.DynamicEntityStore.GetDefinition(System.String)
member.summary: Get entity definition

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.EntityBase
member.summary: Base class for entities with Guid primary key. Inherit from this for standard entities.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.SoftDeleteEntityBase
member.summary: Base class for entities with soft delete support. Use when you need to keep deleted records in the database.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.TenantEntityBase
member.summary: Base class for multi-tenant entities. Use when the application supports multiple tenants.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.OwnedEntityBase
member.summary: Base class for user-owned entities. Use when entities belong to specific users.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.FullEntityBase
member.summary: Full-featured base class with tenant, owner, soft delete, and timestamps. Use this when you need all common features.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.EmbeddableEntityBase
member.summary: Base class for RAG-enabled entities. Use when entities should be searchable via embeddings.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.EmbeddableEntityBase.GetSearchableText
member.summary: Override this to provide the text that will be embedded for RAG search.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IEntity`1
member.summary: Base interface for all entities managed by the generic API. Entities must have a unique identifier.
member.typeparam: The type of the primary key (usually Guid, int, or string)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IEntity`1.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this entity

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IEntity
member.summary: Convenience interface for entities using Guid as primary key (most common case)

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasTimestamps
member.summary: Interface for entities that track creation and modification timestamps

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasTimestamps.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the entity was created (UTC)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasTimestamps.UpdatedAt
member.summary: When the entity was last modified (UTC)

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.ISoftDelete
member.summary: Interface for entities that support soft deletion

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.ISoftDelete.IsDeleted
member.summary: Whether the entity has been soft-deleted

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.ISoftDelete.DeletedAt
member.summary: When the entity was deleted (UTC), if deleted

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasTenant
member.summary: Interface for entities that belong to a tenant (multi-tenant support)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasTenant.TenantId
member.summary: The tenant identifier this entity belongs to

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasOwner
member.summary: Interface for entities that belong to a user

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IHasOwner.OwnerId
member.summary: The user identifier who owns this entity

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.ISearchable
member.summary: Interface for entities that can be searched via text

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.ISearchable.GetSearchableText
member.summary: Gets the searchable text representation of this entity. Used for full-text search and RAG embeddings.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IEmbeddable
member.summary: Interface for entities that support embedding/RAG integration

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IEmbeddable.Embedding
member.summary: The embedding vector for this entity (if computed)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Entities.IEmbeddable.EmbeddingComputedAt
member.summary: When the embedding was last computed (UTC)

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring the application pipeline

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseGenericEntityApi(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the tenant filtering middleware to the pipeline. Call this after authentication middleware.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring generic API services

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddGenericEntityApi``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions})
member.summary: Adds the generic entity API services to the DI container.

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddGenericEntity``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a specific entity type for the generic API

member.name: M:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddGenericEntity``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a specific entity type with a custom repository

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring the generic entity API

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.AutoDiscoverEntities
member.summary: Whether to automatically discover and register entities implementing IEntity

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.EntityAssemblies
member.summary: Assemblies to scan for entity types. If empty, scans entry assembly.

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.ConfigurationFilePath
member.summary: Path to the entity configuration file (YAML or JSON)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.ConfigurationDirectoryPath
member.summary: Path to a directory containing entity configuration files

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.DefaultPageSize
member.summary: Default page size for list operations

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.MaxPageSize
member.summary: Maximum page size for list operations

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.EnableSoftDelete
member.summary: Whether to enable soft delete by default

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Extensions.GenericApiOptions.EnableTimestamps
member.summary: Whether to track timestamps by default

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Middleware.TenantFilterMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that extracts tenant and user context from the request. This context can be used for automatic filtering of entities.

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Middleware.ITenantContext
member.summary: Interface for accessing the current tenant/user context

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Middleware.ITenantContext.TenantId
member.summary: The current tenant ID (if multi-tenant)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Middleware.ITenantContext.UserId
member.summary: The current user ID (if authenticated)

member.name: P:Hazina.API.Generic.Middleware.ITenantContext.IsAuthenticated
member.summary: Whether the current request is authenticated

member.name: T:Hazina.API.Generic.Middleware.TenantContext
member.summary: Default implementation of ITenantContext Registered as scoped to persist across the request
